title: thelypteris australis
intro: Thelypteris australis, also known as the New Zealand fern or Austral fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Thelypteris australis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or infusion, and it can also be applied topically as a paste or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
